testcase.name: journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 1 :: Admin logs in with bootstrap access and has platform-admin authority
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 2 :: Admin enrolls TOTP MFA for the bootstrap session
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 3 :: Admin confirms MFA enrollment using the live TOTP code
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 4 :: Admin sees the OAuth provider admin inventory
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 5 :: Admin configures the Google OAuth provider for the login page
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 6 :: Admin configures the GitHub OAuth provider for the login page
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 7 :: Admin verifies both OAuth providers are visible to public login clients
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 8 :: Admin creates the first production workspace
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 9 :: Admin creates the platform-core namespace inside the workspace
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 10 :: Admin creates the finance-ops namespace for regulated automations
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 11 :: Admin invites a first workspace user with a viewer role
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 12 :: Admin configures workspace-level visibility grants
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 13 :: Admin creates the first workspace guardrail policy
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 14 :: Admin registers the observer governance agent
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 15 :: Admin registers the judge governance agent
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 16 :: Admin registers the enforcer governance agent
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 17 :: Admin configures the governance chain observer to judge to enforcer
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 18 :: Admin configures default alert preferences for the bootstrap user
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 19 :: An invited collaborator joins the workspace with the assigned role
journeys/test_j01_admin_bootstrap.py::test_j01_admin_bootstrap :: step 20 :: Final state confirms workspace detail, namespaces, governance chain, alerts, and members
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 1 :: Creator signs in via GitHub OAuth and receives a session token
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 2 :: Creator session carries workspace-admin RBAC from the GitHub provider mapping
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 3 :: Admin grants the creator access to the primary and shadow workspaces
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 4 :: Creator opens the primary workspace and selects the finance-ops namespace
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 5 :: Admin narrows primary visibility to finance agents and isolates the shadow workspace
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 6 :: Creator registers a KYC verifier with a complete manifest and packaged revision
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 7 :: Creator patches visibility patterns, tags, and descriptive metadata on the agent profile
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 8 :: Registry exposes the immutable revision digest for the uploaded package
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 9 :: FQN resolution returns the newly registered agent with the long-form purpose intact
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 10 :: Creator authors a workspace policy and attaches it to the uploaded revision
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 11 :: Trust reviewer approves certification for the current revision with evidence
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 12 :: Certification history shows an active record tied to the current revision
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 13 :: Creator promotes the agent lifecycle from draft to validated
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 14 :: Creator raises the maturity level to a production-ready tier
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 15 :: Creator publishes the certified agent to the marketplace
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 16 :: Marketplace listing appears in the primary workspace with trust-related fields
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 17 :: Marketplace intent search for KYC verification finds the published agent
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 18 :: The same listing is blocked from a shadow workspace outside the configured visibility scope
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 19 :: Registry FQN-pattern discovery returns the published agent in the finance namespace
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 20 :: Purpose and approach text remain searchable through registry keyword search
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 21 :: Creator seeds a minimal evaluation set and benchmark case for the published agent
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 22 :: Quick evaluation run is created for the published agent and reaches a terminal state
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 23 :: Evaluation history endpoints store the run and expose per-case verdict data
journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 24 :: AgentOps gate-check records the published revision state for downstream promotion decisions

journeys/test_j02_creator_to_publication.py::test_j02_creator_to_publication[oauth_github] :: step 25 :: Final state confirms the agent is certified, published, discoverable, and backed by evaluation history
journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 1 :: Consumer signs in via Google OAuth and receives a session token
journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 2 :: Google sign-in yields a provisioned consumer with the default role

journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 3 :: Admin grants the consumer access to the published-agent workspace and tunes listing metadata
journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 4 :: Admin classifies the published agent and verifies tag plus label catalog filtering
journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 5 :: Consumer browses the marketplace home within the workspace scope
journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 6 :: Consumer searches by intent "verify customer identity"
journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 7 :: Marketplace search ranks the published agent with trust and relevance data
journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 8 :: Consumer inspects the published agent profile with FQN, purpose, and trust badges
journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 9 :: Consumer inspects the quality profile exposed on the marketplace listing
journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 10 :: Consumer starts a new conversation for the identity-verification task

journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 11 :: Conversation detail returns the new conversation identifier and zero initial messages
journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 12 :: Consumer opens the first interaction and transitions it to a running state
journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 13 :: Consumer sends the first task message into the conversation
journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 14 :: Admin provisions a single-step workflow bound to the published agent
journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 15 :: Consumer subscribes to conversation-scoped websocket updates

journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 16 :: First execution is created and execution plus reasoning websocket channels attach successfully

journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 17 :: The first execution reaches completion and execution websocket updates remain in causal order

journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 18 :: Reasoning websocket updates and the persisted reasoning trace expose live execution metadata

journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 19 :: Task plan and execution journal expose provenance, selected agents, and timeline data

journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 20 :: Consumer injects follow-up context into the running conversation after reviewing the first result

journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 21 :: The first interaction is completed and a second interaction starts in the same conversation

journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 22 :: The second task message is sent and conversation websocket events preserve the causal sequence

journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 23 :: Consumer configures completion-only alerts, runs the second task, and receives a notification

journeys/test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution.py::test_j03_consumer_discovery_execution[oauth_google] :: step 24 :: Conversation history ends with two completed interactions and both execution traces persisted
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 1 :: Collaborator signs in via Google OAuth and receives a session token
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 2 :: Admin grants the collaborator workspace membership and admin authority
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 3 :: Collaborator opens the prepared workspace and sees four subscribed agents
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 4 :: Collaborator creates a fresh workspace goal and receives a READY state with a GID
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 5 :: Collaborator clears unread alerts and opens websocket auto-subscriptions
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 6 :: Collaborator creates a conversation and links an interaction to the goal
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 7 :: Collaborator posts the first goal message and echoes the goal GID
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 8 :: The first goal message transitions the goal from READY to WORKING
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 9 :: Response decision rationale records respond for relevant agents and skip for the notifier
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 10 :: The market-data agent responds because the request is relevant to market analysis
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 11 :: The risk-analysis agent responds because the request is relevant to hedging risk
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 12 :: The client-advisory agent responds because the request is relevant to client guidance
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 13 :: The notification agent is skipped and does not post a goal response
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 14 :: All first-round responses preserve the same GID header and use agent FQNs as participants
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 15 :: Collaborator posts a follow-up steering the team toward green energy focus
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 16 :: Relevant agents incorporate the green-energy follow-up in their next responses
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 17 :: A relevant agent raises an attention request linked to the goal and interaction
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 18 :: WebSocket delivers the attention request with the expected payload
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 19 :: Collaborator sees the attention notification persisted in the inbox
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 20 :: Collaborator resolves the attention request after reviewing the alert
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 21 :: Collaborator marks the goal COMPLETE and the API rejects any subsequent goal message
journeys/test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration.py::test_j04_workspace_goal_collaboration :: step 22 :: Kafka event logs preserve the same GID downstream and the final goal thread stays consistent
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 1 :: Trust reviewer signs in with trust-review authority
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 2 :: Reviewer opens the seeded governance workspace and executor profile
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 3 :: Reviewer creates a workspace safety policy that blocks PII disclosure
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 4 :: Reviewer labels the executor and saves a label-expression scoped policy
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 5 :: Reviewer attaches the safety policy to the executor revision
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 6 :: Reviewer configures the Observer to Judge to Enforcer governance chain
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 7 :: Workspace governance-chain projection returns the active chain
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 8 :: Safety pre-screener blocks an obvious instruction-injection violation
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 9 :: Trust event stream records the pre-screener block
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 10 :: A subtle violation is routed through the full governance pipeline
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 11 :: Judge emits a violation verdict event with an auditable rationale source
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 12 :: Reviewer stores a direct governance verdict projection for audit lookup
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 13 :: Enforcer blocks the action and writes an enforcement record
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 14 :: Operator-facing governance event records the enforcement action
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 15 :: Audit event lookup accepts the enforcement correlation identifier
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 16 :: Reviewer attaches a behavioral contract with response-time and accuracy thresholds
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 17 :: Contract breach execution is blocked and publishes a trust surveillance signal
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 18 :: Trust score remains queryable after the breach signal
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 19 :: Third-party certification is requested and approved for marketplace trust display
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 20 :: Marketplace badge is visible after publishing the certified agent
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 21 :: Surveillance recertification trigger is represented as a trust signal
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 22 :: Reviewer decommissions the non-compliant agent from marketplace discovery
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 23 :: Historical agent data remains available by direct registry lookup
journeys/test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline.py::test_j05_trust_governance_pipeline :: step 24 :: Final state confirms policy, verdict, enforcement, contract, certification, and signal
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 1 :: Operator signs in with platform-operator authority
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 2 :: Operator opens the workload workspace and seeded fleet
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 3 :: Operator reads runtime warm-pool capacity and available-pod metrics
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 4 :: Operator verifies the preloaded workload has active and queued executions
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 5 :: Operator creates a checkpointed long-running execution
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 6 :: Execution event stream exposes the created checkpoint
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 7 :: Operator forces a runtime pod kill through the E2E chaos endpoint
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 8 :: Heartbeat-driven recovery is surfaced by a terminal execution state
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 9 :: Operator rolls the execution back to the last observed checkpoint
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 10 :: Rollback resume check confirms execution state was not restarted from scratch
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 11 :: Rollback and completion are visible in the execution journal
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 12 :: Operator inspects execution timeline and reasoning trace after recovery
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 13 :: Operator reviews governance verdicts generated during incident handling
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 14 :: Operator records an enforcement action for the runtime incident
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 15 :: Operator injects low-priority and urgent executions for queue reprioritization
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 16 :: Urgent execution is reprioritized and completes no later than the low-priority run
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 17 :: Operator opens analytics usage and cost-intelligence dashboards
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 18 :: AgentOps drift signal is generated from the incident outcome
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 19 :: Operator saves and shares an incident triage view for the recovered agent
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 20 :: Operator reviews the adaptation proposal created from the drift signal
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 21 :: Operator approves the adaptation path by promoting the agent maturity signal
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 22 :: Operator creates a canary deployment for the recovered agent
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 23 :: Operator verifies rollback endpoint for the canary
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 24 :: Operator decommissions the recovered workload agent while preserving direct lookup
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 25 :: Admin removes the saved-view owner and verifies orphan transfer
journeys/test_j06_operator_incident_response.py::test_j06_operator_incident_response :: step 26 :: Final state preserves incident response, analytics, adaptation, canary, and decommission records
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 1 :: Evaluator signs in with evaluator authority
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 2 :: Evaluator opens the published agent profile selected for improvement
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 3 :: Evaluator creates an evaluation suite with TrajectoryScorer dimensions
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 4 :: Evaluator creates an LLM-as-Judge rubric for review rationale
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 5 :: Evaluator adds ten benchmark cases to the suite
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 6 :: Evaluator runs the ten-case suite against the published agent
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 7 :: TrajectoryScorer persists four-dimensional score data per sampled execution
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 8 :: LLM-as-Judge stores verdicts with rationale-compatible dimensions
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 9 :: Calibration repeats three cases five times and records score distribution inputs
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 10 :: Calibration summary exposes mean and standard-deviation inputs
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 11 :: Evaluation result view lists the suite run and per-case verdict data
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 12 :: Evaluator creates a second revision signal and compares it to the baseline
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 13 :: Evaluator triggers AgentOps adaptation from the observed score delta
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 14 :: Adaptation proposal review is retrievable for approval workflow
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 15 :: Approved adaptation creates a new registry revision signal
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 16 :: Evaluator reruns the suite against the improved revision
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 17 :: Re-evaluation shows the targeted dimensions improved without regression
journeys/test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop.py::test_j07_evaluator_improvement_loop :: step 18 :: Final state preserves suite, cases, scores, calibration, proposal, revision, and rerun
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 1 :: External bearer token identifies the caller and carries usable auth claims
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 2 :: External client fetches the platform Agent Card well-known document
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 3 :: Agent Card advertises executable skills, endpoints, and bearer auth
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 4 :: External client fetches the per-agent card by FQN
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 5 :: Registry resolution confirms the card FQN maps to the published agent
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 6 :: OAuth2 bearer token authorizes a single-turn A2A task submission
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 7 :: External client fetches the A2A task status by ID
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 8 :: External client subscribes to A2A Server-Sent Events
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 9 :: A2A events preserve causal order from start to completion
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 10 :: External client starts a multi-turn A2A task requiring clarification
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 11 :: External client sends clarification as a second turn and receives completion state
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 12 :: MCP client discovers available tools through the manifest endpoint
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 13 :: MCP server metadata points clients at the tool manifest
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 14 :: MCP tool invocation routes through the tool gateway
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 15 :: Platform MCP server exposes the same tool through server-call endpoint
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 16 :: Policy output sanitizer redacts secret-like values from tool output
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 17 :: Policy enforcement is verified for the MCP call target
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 18 :: External A2A and MCP paths leave the agent profile unchanged and discoverable
journeys/test_j08_external_a2a_mcp.py::test_j08_external_a2a_mcp :: step 19 :: Final state confirms A2A tasking, SSE, MCP discovery, gateway, policy, and sanitization
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 1 :: Researcher signs in with researcher authority
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 2 :: Researcher creates a dedicated discovery workspace
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 3 :: Admin grants the researcher access to the discovery workspace
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 4 :: Researcher uploads seed observations as discovery knowledge inputs
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 5 :: Hypothesis generation produces at least the configured minimum hypotheses
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 6 :: Researcher triggers Chain of Debates on the top hypotheses
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 7 :: Debate transcript contains position, critique, rebuttal, and synthesis artifacts
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 8 :: Reasoning task plan persists the debate round step
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 9 :: Elo tournament ranking assigns a score to every hypothesis
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 10 :: Researcher computes the proximity graph for similar hypotheses
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 11 :: Proximity graph clusters similar catalyst hypotheses together
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 12 :: Generation bias identifies underrepresented clusters for the next round
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 13 :: Top-ranked hypothesis evolves into a refined variant referencing its source
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 14 :: Researcher links the refined hypothesis into the knowledge view
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 15 :: Experiment design is triggered for the top refined hypothesis
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 16 :: Structured experiment plan contains objective, variables, and success metrics
journeys/test_j09_scientific_discovery.py::test_j09_scientific_discovery :: step 17 :: Final state preserves workspace, hypotheses, debate trace, clusters, evolution, and experiment
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 1 :: Operator is authenticated for multi-region work
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 2 :: Operator reads the active workspace context
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 3 :: Operator declares or observes the primary region
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 4 :: Operator declares a secondary region
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 5 :: Operator reviews replication status
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 6 :: Operator schedules a maintenance window
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 7 :: Operator enables and verifies maintenance when scheduled
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 8 :: In-flight execution surface remains readable during maintenance
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 9 :: Advisory maintenance does not block required consent writes
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 10 :: Operator disables maintenance and read surface remains available
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 11 :: Operator creates a failover rehearsal plan
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 12 :: Operator lists failover plans after creating a rehearsal
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 13 :: Operator rehearses failover when the plan is accepted
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 14 :: Operator reviews failover run history when rehearsal completes
journeys/test_j11_multi_region_journey.py::test_j11_multi_region_journey :: step 15 :: Operator inspects capacity recommendations
journeys/test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle.py::test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle :: step 1 :: Super admin can query the admin health endpoint
journeys/test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle.py::test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle :: step 2 :: Super admin can persist checklist state
journeys/test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle.py::test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle :: step 3 :: Super admin can create a 2PA request
journeys/test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle.py::test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle :: step 4 :: Super admin can enable read-only mode
journeys/test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle.py::test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle :: step 5 :: Read-only mode blocks privileged writes
journeys/test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle.py::test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle :: step 6 :: Super admin can disable read-only mode
journeys/test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle.py::test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle :: step 7 :: Writable session can export platform configuration
journeys/test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle.py::test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle :: step 8 :: Configuration export returns a gzip bundle
journeys/test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle.py::test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle :: step 9 :: Super admin can preview bulk user suspension
journeys/test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle.py::test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle :: step 10 :: Bulk preview response is marked preview
journeys/test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle.py::test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle :: step 11 :: Every admin page has a declared route for axe coverage
journeys/test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle.py::test_j18_super_admin_lifecycle :: step 12 :: Admin route inventory covers lifecycle observability and audit pages
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 1 :: Setup clears limits and enables OAuth providers
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 2 :: US1 visitor starts email signup
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 3 :: US1 visitor verifies email
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 4 :: US1 verified visitor logs in and reads profile
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 5 :: US2 tenant switches to approval mode
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 6 :: US2 pending user verifies email but cannot log in
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 7 :: US2 admin approval unlocks the pending user
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 8 :: US3 Google OAuth callback returns frontend fragment
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 9 :: US3 Google OAuth profile completion activates account
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 10 :: US3 GitHub OAuth organisation restriction is configured
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 11 :: US3 GitHub OAuth accepts an organisation member
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 12 :: US3 GitHub OAuth rejects an organisation outsider
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 13 :: US4 local account is created for link management
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 14 :: US4 authenticated user links GitHub provider
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 15 :: US4 linked providers list includes GitHub
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 16 :: US5 recovery account signs in before linking
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 17 :: US5 recovery account links Google provider
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 18 :: US5 linked OAuth provider recovers account access
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 19 :: US2 pending approval user can be seeded for rejection
journeys/test_j19_new_user_signup.py::test_j19_new_user_signup :: step 20 :: US2 rejection remains terminal for a pending approval user
